features.description: Auto mode rule blocks tampering with session transcript files.
features.reference_changelog_line: Added an auto mode rule that blocks tampering with session transcript files

features.description: Reserved 'Claude Browser' and 'Claude Preview' MCP server names; user servers can no longer register under either.
features.reference_changelog_line: Reserved the "Claude Browser" MCP server name (alongside "Claude Preview") ahead of the Claude Desktop pane rename; user-configured MCP servers can no longer register under either name

features.description: Auto mode now asks before running rm -rf on a variable it cannot resolve from context.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved auto mode to ask before running `rm -rf` on a variable it can't resolve from context

features.description: Background task notifications explicitly state no human input occurred, preventing fabricated approvals from being acted
features.reference_changelog_line: Background task notifications now explicitly state that no human input has occurred, preventing fabricated in-transcript approvals from being acted on

features.description: A failing plugin LSP server no longer prevents another plugin's valid LSP from handling the same file extension.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed a plugin LSP server that fails to initialize preventing a valid LSP server from another plugin handling the same file extension

features.description: claude mcp add-from-claude-desktop reports invalid server names and continues importing the rest instead of hanging.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed `claude mcp add-from-claude-desktop` getting stuck when a server name contains unsupported characters; invalid names are now reported and remaining servers still import

features.description: Project verify skills are only rewritten when a documented command changes, not on every session.
features.reference_changelog_line: Fixed project verify skills being rewritten on every session instead of only when a documented command changed

features.description: /doctor is now a full setup checkup that diagnoses and fixes issues; /checkup is an alias.
features.reference_changelog_line: `/doctor` is now a full setup checkup that can diagnose and fix issues; `/checkup` is its alias

features.description: Agent view links an existing PR when sessions edit, merge, comment on, or push to it.
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved agent view: sessions that edit, merge, comment on, or push to an existing PR now link it in `claude agents`

features.description: Agent rows show colored state word and classifier headline; peek shows full status including exact ask for blocked sessi
features.reference_changelog_line: Improved agent view: rows now show a colored state word and a classifier-written headline instead of raw tool call text, and the peek opens with full status including the exact ask for blocked sessions
